description_long: This shrub consists of several distinct clumps, each with dense, leafy foliage and a rounded, bushy form. The leaves are predominantly green, with some clusters displaying lighter green tips and small white flower buds, suggesting a healthy, thriving plant. The foliage is lush and layered, with leaves arranged in a somewhat radial pattern, giving the shrub a full and voluminous appearance. The plant appears to be composed of multiple individual bushes grouped together, each with slightly different leaf shapes and sizes. The overall structure is compact, with no visible trunk, and the base is obscured by dense foliage. This shrub would be well-suited for use in urban parks, roadside plantings, or landscaped gardens.
description: A dense, multi-clump shrub with lush green foliage and small white flower buds, forming a rounded, bushy mass. The leaves are layered and vibrant, giving the plant a healthy, full appearance.
description_view_0: Multiple shrub clumps are visible side by side, showing a variety of leaf shapes and a mix of green tones with some white flower buds.
description_view_1: A top-down view highlights the dense, radial arrangement of leaves and the central concentration of foliage.
description_view_2: The shrub clumps are seen from the opposite side, again showing the rounded forms and the distribution of white flower buds among the green leaves.
description_view_3: A vertical, overhead view reveals the linear arrangement of the shrub clumps and the layered structure of the foliage.
